features: Dove Advanced Care Original Anti-Perspirant Aerosol features an alcohol-free, kind-to-skin formula
This Advanced Care women's deodorant spray gives up to 72 hours of protection against sweat and odour
This aerosol contains Dove's Advanced Care Formula and features Pro-Ceramide technology that retains moisture deep within your skin
Featuring Dove's most advanced formulation, this anti-perspirant deodorant delivers Dove's kindest to skin formula ever
The Dove Original fragrance in this aerosol keeps you feeling clean, fresh and confident
Globally, Dove deodorant is not tested on animals, with our products being certified as cruelty-free and PETA approved vegan
description: Product Description Looking for an antiperspirant deodorant that leaves underarm skin beautifully soft and smooth? Meet Dove Advanced Care Original Anti-Perspirant Aerosol, combining the underarm skin care you need with the antiperspirant benefits you expect from Dove. With its signature Dove Original fragrance, this reviving anti-perspirant women's deodorant spray is just the thing to help you kick-start your day with confidence and keep you smelling fresh and clean all day long. It works hard to protect your skin, and, featuring Dove's most advanced formula, it helps to reduce underarm irritation caused by shaving. Formulated with innovative pro-ceramide technology, this deodorant spray for women works hard to replenish your skin’s natural moisture barrier with nourishing ceramides (which naturally reduce when you shave), helping it recover from shaving. This triple-action women's deodorant formula combines 72-hour protection with a subtle, long-lasting scent for freshness you know you can depend on. Add in the fact that it has 0% alcohol, and you can be sure it’ll be kind to your skin while being tough on sweat. How to use: Holding the can 15 cm away from your underarm, shake it well to activate the ingredients and spray in short bursts in a well-ventilated area. Avoid direct inhalation and prolonged spraying. Use only as directed. Keep out of reach of children. Dove believes no young person should be held back from reaching their full potential. Since 2004, they have been building self-esteem and confidence in young people – and by 2030, they’ll have helped ¼ billion young people through their educational programmes and resources. Ingredients Butane, Isobutane, Propane, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Cyclopentasiloxane, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Parfum, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Glycine, Calcium Chloride, Octyldodecanol, BHT, Propylene Carbonate, Dimethiconol, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Coumarin, Eugenol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal. Directions Hold the deodorant approximately 15 cm away from your skin and spray for one to two seconds on each underarm. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
